metadata.description: Default managed flight profile rules for Jeju APP simulator. Values are training-simulation defaults, not certified aircraft performance data.
principles: Arrival procedure speeds are treated as maximum restrictions, not acceleration targets.
ARR/APP RESUME NORMAL SPEED releases controller-assigned speed and does not command acceleration.
DEP RESUME NORMAL SPEED returns to the climb speed schedule.
Arrival descent below 10000 ft is gated until IAS is at or below 250 kt.
DES VIA to a below-10000-ft constraint uses A100/250 first when the aircraft is still fast.
Minimum speed is a controller command to reduce toward 155 kt, not an automatic below-5000-ft floor.
ILS final speed schedule is IAF 195 kt, IF 180 kt, 5 NM 160 kt, then aircraft-type landing speed inside 5 NM.

notes: APP/ARR speed restrictions cap speed only; they do not cause speed-up after RESUME NORMAL SPEED.
MANBA/YUMIN/DUKAL/LIMSO/TOKIN/RWY speed values are v1 training defaults aligned to the current modeled STAR/ILS flow.
MINIMUM SPEED uses minimum_speed_command.target_speed_kt as a practical deceleration target. It is not the same as SPEED OR GREATER.
